title: GrapeVelvet
description: A quick and refreshing Korean dish featuring fresh grape tomatoes steamed to perfection for a delightful diabetic-friendly snack.
instructions: Place grape tomatoes in a small saucepan.
Add water and salt to the saucepan, ensuring the water covers the tomatoes by about an inch.
Bring mixture to a gentle simmer over medium heat.
Reduce heat to maintain a low simmer, allowing the tomatoes to steam for approximately 5 minutes or until just cooked through but still firm.
Use tongs to carefully transfer the tomatoes from the saucepan into a bowl of ice water to stop the cooking process and help reduce their acidity slightly.
Drain and pat dry the cooled grape tomatoes with paper towels before serving.
